displayName.description: Indicates the visible name defined for the resource. Typically specified when the resource is created.

groupType.description: When type is set to Group, this indicates the group type. The possible values are: unifiedGroups, azureAD, and unknownFutureValue

id.description: Indicates the unique ID of the resource.

modifiedProperties.description: Indicates name, old value and new value of each attribute that changed. Property values depend on the operation type.

type.description: Describes the resource type.  Example values include Application, Group, ServicePrincipal, and User.

userPrincipalName.description: When type is set to User, this includes the user name that initiated the action; null for other types.
